title: pouteria dugulla
intro: Pouteria dugulla is a type of plant native to the Pacific Islands, belonging to the family Sapotaceae, commonly known as the sapote tree. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Pouteria dugulla has been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, infections, and fever, due to its ability to promote healing and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
